Guest starring Fay Ripley (Cold Feet), with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Cora makes a discovery that throws the inheritance issue into chaos, and Mary is prompted to keep Matthew waiting for an answer to his proposal. Robert arranges for Mrs Patmore to see an eye specialist, and O'Brien digs up more compromising information about Bates, but the Earl's response comes as a surprise. Thomas leaves the Abbey and Mary exacts vengeance on Edith for her treachery, while the household is rocked by a shocking announcement. Drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prestigious golf club is the setting for murder when a player is bludgeoned to death on the 13th hole. Barnaby and Jones discover gambling, illegal money-lending and assault are rife among the snobbish members, who are also dismissive of the local villagers and only allow them on the course for a few hours a week. Before long, another body turns up, making the detectives doubly determined to catch this terror of the fairways. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Nicholas Le Prevost, John Standing and real-life golfer Sam Torrance

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: It's 1946 and although one war has ended, another is looming as the Iron Curtain falls across Europe. Foyle arrives home from America, where he is wanted in connection with a suspicious suicide, but MI5 offers him a way out. The agency suspects Britain's atomic research programme has been infiltrated and wants to recruit him to investigate a Soviet spy ring that could be at work in the heart of London. Detective drama, starring Michael Kitchen, with Honeysuckle Weeks, Ellie Haddington and Dylan Charles

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The young monarch decides it is time to try her hand at foreign relations, as she and an entourage of servants and fellow royals set sail for France. King Louis Philippe has arranged for his son to marry the Queen of Spain, and diplomats in London have grown concerned that this could be the basis of a dangerous new alliance. However, on arriving at Louis Philippe's court, Victoria realises she will need to keep her wits about her if she is to have any hope of getting her wily French counterpart to take her seriously. Worse still, the young queen finds herself tackling this challenge alone, as Albert remains troubled by the revelations about his parentage, and is horrified into silence by the apparent decadence of the French court

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The queen is horrified by news of famine sweeping Ireland, and tries to persuade the government to take action. However, Peel is reluctant to get involved, fearing that sending aid will destabilise his own party. The crisis soon strikes at the heart of the royal household, while a determined Reverend turns up on Victoria's doorstep, demanding help for his parish. Martin Compston (Line of Duty) guest stars

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The trio move out to allow workmen into the flat, and Robin is more than happy to share a bed - until he finds out who with. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Coma victim Harriet Farmer finally wakes up a year after she was attacked while trying to elope, but her boyfriend Finn Robson is still missing. Soon after she regains consciousness, members of a chess club are targeted by a killer. Could the assault that left Harriet for dead be linked to moves on a games board? Guest starring Fay Ripley (Cold Feet), with Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass embarks on his most bizarre exploit yet - robbing a grave in Aidensfield churchyard to retrieve a stuffed sheep that has mistakenly been buried instead of its former owner. It sounds like something out of a macabre black comedy, but as usual there's a method in his madness - and a quick profit uppermost in his mind. Nick Berry and Bill Maynard star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The police try to get to the bottom of the kidnap drama and its shocking outcome. Kelly is full of remorse over Scott. Tricia tries to impress Richie with her literary knowledge

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly tells Viv she does not want to see Roy again. Chris is scared of going home. Zoe hears Viv call her a murderer

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Les rows with Toyah over the bomb hoax call. Greg urges Sally to stand firm and not sign the mortgage papers. Alec is furious when Vera docks his pay

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally is pleased to have spent the night with Greg. Ken tries to cheer Toyah up. Curly tells Anne not to sack Alma. Alec plans to move back to Southampton

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The trio move out to allow workmen into the flat, and Robin is more than happy to share a bed - until he finds out who with. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When dairy worker Debbie Moffett (played by Martine McCutcheon) is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. Pathologist Kate Wilding discovers the victim's daughter was being expelled from the local prep school and it emerges Debbie died just hours after an argument at a parents' council meeting. Her phone leads the detectives to Oliver Ordish, with whom she was having an affair

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: It is November 1916, and the family and servants are getting the house ready for a concert to raise funds to treat more casualties from the front. Bates returns from London with a proposal for Anna, while Isobel informs Robert and Cora that Matthew is engaged and wants to bring his fiancee to Downton. O'Brien plays a trick on new maid Ethel after taking an instant dislike to her. Costume drama, starring Maggie Smith, Hugh Bonneville and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: The chalk-and-cheese detective duo are called to a private clinic where a wealthy patient has been killed. However, their investigation is made all the more difficult by the complex relationships of the victim's former fellow residents. Jason Watkins and Tala Gouveia take the lead roles in the second of two mystery dramas, with an all-star supporting cast including Caroline Catz, Hugh Dennis, Michele Dotrice, Freddie Fox, Suzanne Packer and Joanna Scanlan

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective's investigation into the death of a nameless Russian leads to a mysterious military facility run by Colonel Harry Galt, a respected soldier with an impeccable war record. However, as Foyle makes inquiries, he realises the deceased was a spy with dangerous connections to British Intelligence. Meanwhile, Sam does her best to help husband Adam during his by-election campaign, but can't help putting her foot in it. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Jonathan Hyde and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: After a series of assassination attempts, the queen is forced to seek sanctuary far from the palace. She and Albert travel to the Scottish Highlands, an area that has always fascinated her, but proves to be far from the romantic retreat she had fantasised about. However, travelling incognito gives both the royal couple and their servants a freedom they do not often experience. Denis Lawson guest stars

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Albert resents Lehzen's influence over the queen, and fears she is putting the health of their children at risk. The prince also unwittingly creates problems for Peel, who is facing the most important battle of his political career as he takes a stand against the corn laws. However, the embattled prime minister discovers that Albert has played into their enemies' hands. The growing tension creates a rift between the royal couple, but when tragedy strikes, personal and political sacrifices must be made

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When dairy worker Debbie Moffett (played by Martine McCutcheon) is crushed to death by a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue, Barnaby and Jones are soon on the case. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: An ex-soldier visits Aidensfield on holiday and his daughter strikes up a relationship with a local farm hand. Greengrass finds himself the owner of stolen cigarettes and Jo receives tragic news. Rural drama, with Bill Maynard and Nick Berry

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Richie continues to thwart Tricia's advances. Bernice tells Gavin that her mother is coming to stay. Kelly wants a party in the Woolpack to celebrate Roy's release

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly goes to meet Roy on his release from prison. Eric offers to go into partnership with Kathy at the diner. Roy tells Kelly they need to find a place of their own

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Kevin accuses Sally of pushing him out of the house. Toyah runs away from home. Alec is amazed when Rita tells him she does want to marry him

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Janice worries about Toyah's whereabouts. Sally asks Kevin to move back in and promises to try to make their marriage work. Alec and Rita agree to marry as soon as possible

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman is killed in a mysterious explosion aboard his fishing boat and suspicion falls on his son, Wycliffe feels sure the real culprit is to be found elsewhere and unearths several locals with a motive for murder. Jack Shepherd stars as the Cornish copper, with Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A series of killings in Midsomer St Claire seem to be inspired by macabre images on a medieval fresco recently discovered in the church crypt. As the village prepares for storms and flooding, it appears that someone is using ancient torture methods to punish modern-day 'sinners'. With help from sidekick Charlie Nelson, Barnaby tries to get to the bottom of the case, and unearths a long-held secret that takes him by surprise. With Rebecca Front, Andrea Lowe, Vincent Regan and Roy Hudd

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Isobel suggests using Downton as a place of convalescence following a distressing incident at the village hospital. Shell-shocked new valet Lang arrives as William gets his call-up papers, and Carson strives to keep standards high, but suffers a panic attack in front of the family. Lady Rosamund is eager to unearth Lavinia and Carlisle's secret after overhearing them arguing, and romance blossoms for both Edith and Mary. Costume drama, starring Jim Carter, Samantha Bond and Cal Macaninch

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A body is found buried on the Northumberland moors which could be a missing teenager from the nearby rural community of Brindale. The girl had disappeared six weeks previously, and Vera has to break the news to her devastated family. However, the realisation that she died so close to home rather than at a music festival as originally thought creates tension among her neighbours, who are soon suspecting each other of murder. The detective delves into the vulnerable young woman's isolated existence to identify her killer

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective is drawn into the strange murder of eminent art historian Professor Van Haren, who was really a former high-ranking Nazi hired by MI5 due to his expert knowledge of Soviet intelligence. Meanwhile, as Sam's husband Adam embarks on a busy career as an MP, she worries whether she will be able to share some big news with him. Crime drama set in the 1940s, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Tamzin Outhwaite and Rupert Vansittart

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Feature-length festive special. It is Christmas 1846 and Victoria is uncharacteristically sad as she prepares to face her first Christmas without her beloved Baroness Lehzen, while Albert transforms the palace into a magical festive wonderland as he is gripped by an obsession with staging the perfect family Christmas. But tensions between the couple mount when the prince invites house guests to join the celebrations. Meanwhile, Skerrett inherits a large estate from an estranged uncle. Starring Jenna Coleman and Tom Hughes

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As Foyle prepares to be replaced at the police station and begin retirement, his attention is grabbed by a news story about a man sentenced to hang for high treason, and he decides to take on the case. Meanwhile, Samantha and Adam fight to save Hill House from the town planners determined to demolish it - but disaster soon strikes. Starring Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks and Max Brown

With help from sidekick Charlie Nelson, Barnaby tries to get to the bottom of the case, and unearths a long-held secret that takes him by surprise. With Rebecca Front, Andrea Lowe, Vincent Regan and Roy Hudd

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Isobel suggests using Downton as a place of convalescence following a distressing incident at the village hospital. Shell-shocked new valet Lang arrives as William gets his call-up papers, and Carson strives to keep standards high, but suffers a panic attack in front of the family. Lady Rosamund is eager to unearth Lavinia and Carlisle's secret after overhearing them arguing, and romance blossoms for both Edith and Mary. Costume drama, starring Jim Carter, Samantha Bond and Cal Macaninch

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A body is found buried on the Northumberland moors which could be a missing teenager from the nearby rural community of Brindale. The girl had disappeared six weeks previously, and Vera has to break the news to her devastated family. However, the realisation that she died so close to home rather than at a music festival as originally thought creates tension among her neighbours, who are soon suspecting each other of murder. The detective delves into the vulnerable young woman's isolated existence to identify her killer

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The detective is drawn into the strange murder of eminent art historian Professor Van Haren, who was really a former high-ranking Nazi hired by MI5 due to his expert knowledge of Soviet intelligence. Meanwhile, as Sam's husband Adam embarks on a busy career as an MP, she worries whether she will be able to share some big news with him. Crime drama set in the 1940s, starring Michael Kitchen and Honeysuckle Weeks, with Tamzin Outhwaite and Rupert Vansittart

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Feature-length festive special. It is Christmas 1846 and Victoria is uncharacteristically sad as she prepares to face her first Christmas without her beloved Baroness Lehzen, while Albert transforms the palace into a magical festive wonderland as he is gripped by an obsession with staging the perfect family Christmas. But tensions between the couple mount when the prince invites house guests to join the celebrations. Meanwhile, Skerrett inherits a large estate from an estranged uncle. Starring Jenna Coleman and Tom Hughes

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The family return from holiday, and it seems as if they never went away. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era, including Nijinsky, Tiger Roll, Best Mate, Desert Orchid and Shergar

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates the stories behind supposedly deadly freshwater creatures, beginning by examining whether piranhas deserve their fearsome reputation. He travels to Brazil to swim in the Amazon with the fish and incites them into a feeding frenzy, before tracking down survivors and eyewitnesses of attacks

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The Baker Street sleuth is summoned to the Lake District to investigate the mysterious disappearance of an enigmatic woman. Period detective drama, guest starring Michael Jayston and Cheryl Campbell with Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel track down a mysterious glowing man responsible for a string of macabre and grisly murders. Patrick Macnee and Diana Rigg star, with a guest appearance by Ray McAnally

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A crooked foreign diplomat helps arrange the theft of a consignment of silver bullion being transported through Tilbury docks. Bodie and Doyle are assigned to investigate, and it becomes apparent that they have a useful link to the villains via Doyle's girlfriend Deborah. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Reshmin Chowdhury presents action from Russia v Denmark at Parken in Copenhagen and Finland v Belgium Saint Petersburg Stadium in Group B and North Macedonia v Netherlands at Johan Cruijff ArenA in Amsterdam and Ukraine v Austria at National Arena Bucharest in Group D, as both groups reached a conclusion. Plus, previews of England v Czech Republic and Scotland v Croatia. With analysis from Andros Townsend and Nadia Nadim

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur is conned into buying a dodgy greyhound and lumbered with a pile of knocked-off videos, and it is up to Terry to save him from a fate worse than death. Vintage drama, starring Dennis Waterman, George Cole and Patrick Malahide

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar encounters a girl who claims to be Hitler's daughter, and helps her evade Neo-Nazis. Vintage adventure, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood looks back at television sporting firsts, including footage of a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan who would go on to take snooker by storm

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A governess is accused of shooting dead her millionaire employer's wife on a remote bridge - but Holmes' deductive powers suggest an alternative explanation to the mystery. Period detective drama, guest starring Daniel Massey, with Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A friend of Emma's returns from abroad in the hope of retiring to Little Storping-in-the-Swurf, but discovers the village is harbouring a secret. Starring Diana Rigg and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur employs a truck-load of ex-cons as cheap labour for his new landscape gardening business and things go swimmingly - until a series of thefts puts paid to the enterprise and he finds himself out of pocket. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole travels to the Isle of Man to interview Enduro legend David Knight, and meet the Norton racing team, while he also begins a restoration project

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Croatia v Scotland (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from both sides' third and final Group D match, which takes place at Hampden Park. The Scots are unbeaten in five previous fixtures against Croatia, with two wins and three draws, which is a remarkable record against a nation that has achieved so much since becoming independent in 1991. They will need nothing less than a win to progress this evening, having performed well so far but picked up just one point, in a goalless draw with England. The Croats also have just a single point to their name, picked up in a 1-1 draw with the Czech Republic, having lost their opener 1-0 against England. Seema Jaswal presents, with analysis from Graeme Souness, John Collins and Scott Brown, and commentary by Joe Speight and Ally McCoist

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Murtaugh meets his match in former international CIA agent Wesley Cole (Seann William Scott), who returns home and assumes duty as an LAPD officer. Cole soon finds himself navigating a new partnership with Murtaugh as he adjusts to life in Los Angeles, while Avery continues his campaign for city council. With Damon Wayans, Keesha Sharp and Kevin Rahm

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar is persuaded to shadow a defecting civil servant who has been duped into carrying confidential papers to East Germany. Guest starring Ronald Hines

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The fossil record shows that the arapaima fish has roamed the waters of the Amazon River since the Jurassic age, and uses its bony tongue to crush prey against the roof of its mouth before swallowing. Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade encountered the species once before and came out second best, so this time he is taking no chances as he investigates every aspect of this huge creature

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A racehorse trainer asks Holmes to investigate the mysterious disappearance of one of his cash-strapped employer's many creditors. Victorian whodunit, starring Jeremy Brett and Edward Hardwicke, with a young Jude Law in an early supporting role

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed is called in to investigate when Sir Gerald Bancroft and his Rolls-Royce mysteriously disappear while being escorted around a military base. Light-hearted drama, starring Patrick Macnee, Diana Rigg and Francis Matthews

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets an illegal car phone, while Terry dates the wealthy daughter of a hamburger king who suddenly goes bankrupt. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Malahide and Peter Capaldi alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Sweden v Poland (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of both sides' final Group E fixture, which takes place at Saint Petersburg Stadium. Despite an injury that prevented Zlatan Ibrahimovic's return to the international fold, the Swedes have performed well in this tournament so far, holding pre-tournament group favourites Spain to a goalless draw in their opener, before prevailing 1-0 against Slovakia. Meanwhile, Poland bounced back from a disappointing 2-1 win against the Slovakians, when star man Robert Lewandowski's goal gave them a point against Spain, but they will need a win to have any change of reaching the last 16

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s, ranging from football and boxing to wrestling and double decker racing

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson slips into silly mode once more as his comic alter ego visits the launderette and somehow manages to lose his trousers, getting himself into a real pickle as he tries to retrieve them. Fully dressed again, he moves on to the crazy golf course, where the relatively simple task of hitting the ball leads to utter chaos

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Everyone's favourite idiot visits hospital to cure a nasty little problem, but proves to be a somewhat impatient outpatient, and later has trouble sleeping. Starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut, but ends up styling the other customers' hair. Later, he causes chaos at a school fun day. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport. Sue saves a passenger who is a musician from missing his concert. Elsewhere in the airport, there is a serious breach of security. Meanwhile, Ian goes in for a promotion

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, New Border Force Officer Rob arrives on a hectic day at Heathrow airport and sets to work investigating job scams. Meanwhile, the grass is in desperate need of a trim, and duo Sophie and Rachel rave about airside safety

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: A reprogrammed killing machine is sent back in time to the 20th century to protect John Connor, a teenage boy whose destiny is to save the human race. After breaking John's mother out of a mental institution, the pair set out to avert a future nuclear war - pursued by an advanced prototype terminator with shape-changing powers. Sci-fi action adventure sequel, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Linda Hamilton, Edward Furlong and Robert Patrick

Action adventure, starring James McAvoy, Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman

programme.desc: Reshmin Chowdhury presents actiojn from Slovakia v Spain at Estadio La Cartuja in Seville and Sweden v Poland at Saint Petersburg Stadium in Group E, and Portugal v France at Puskas Arena in Budapest and Germany v Hungary at at Fußball Arena München in Group F, as both groups concluded. With analysis from Andros Townsend, Robert Earnshaw and John Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets an illegal car phone, while Terry dates the wealthy daughter of a hamburger king who suddenly goes bankrupt. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Malahide and Peter Capaldi alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar sets out on the trail of a former Nazi believed to have taken refuge in South America. Vintage drama, guest starring Francesca Annis, Roger Delgado, John Barrie and Maurice Kaufmann

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the foothills of the Himalayas to investigate stories of deadly attacks by the man-eating goonch catfish, tracking down the species to establish if its methods of killing are as gruesome as reports suggest

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A desperate girl contacts Holmes and asks him to clear her boyfriend of killing his father, a farmer found bludgeoned to death beside a lake. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett , Peter Vaughan and James Purefoy

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Mrs Peel investigate reports of a traitor in the ranks, and end up facing the heart-breaking prospect of bidding each other farewell. Patrick Macnee stars, with Diana Rigg making her final appearance as Emma and Linda Thorson taking over as Steed's latest partner Tara King

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A recently released convict causes chaos when he takes a group of hospital patients hostage. Bodie and Doyle try to get to him before he can start shooting. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur makes a hasty agreement to stage a burglary after his tailor's staff go on strike demanding more pay. The bumbling safecracker he hires blows himself up, leaving Arthur and Terry with the task of liberating him from hospital before his bandages are removed and the duo can be linked with the botched crime

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole rides a 1960s drag bike at North Weald airstrip, tells the story of the Brough Superior and continues his project to strip down an ivy-covered Honda

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh returns with the celebrity version of the team quiz show. As ever, four star contestants are challenged to pit their wits against one of the show's ruthless quiz experts, in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for their charity of choice. This time, Absolute Radio's Christian O'Connell, singer, TV presenter and vocal coach Carrie Grant, Channel 5 children's presenter Naomi Wilkinson and I, Daniel Blake star Dave Johns each try to race down the game board without being caught, before joining forces for the final chase

programme.title: Quantum of Solace (2008)
programme.desc: James Bond sets out on a personal mission of vengeance as he pursues the secret criminal organisation Quantum. His search leads him to the head of an ecological corporation, who is plotting to orchestrate a coup in a Latin American country to get his hands on a precious natural resource. Spy thriller sequel, starring Daniel Craig, Olga Kurylenko, Judi Dench, Gemma Arterton and Mathieu Amalric

programme.desc: Brianna suspects she may have postpartum depression. After life-threatening complications during her ground-breaking surgery, Christy's recovery proves even harder than anticipated

programme.title: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Two active boys and their hockey equipment have overtaken Dan and Voula's cramped suburban home. The couple are desperate to move to a larger property. However, they will not be going anywhere unless they can overhaul their current home and sell it for a sizable sum, so Jonathan and Drew Scott offer their expert advice

programme.title: Dinner Date

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire

programme.desc: Former Baywatch star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after a surgeon gave her implants that are too large. programme.title: Vanderpump Rules

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host the game show where contestants pit their wits against each other in a battle of words and numbers. Gloria Hunniford is in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane buy the house they've always dreamed of, but their happiness is cut short when they begin to feel sorry for the previous owners. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane finalise their wedding plans, but regulars at the bar still have reservations about the proposed nuptials. As the couple prepare to exchange their vows, Professor Sumner Sloan shows up to reveal a publisher is interested in one of Diane's manuscripts - if she is willing to leave with him immediately to start rewrites

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is dismayed to learn his children would rather spend time with their uncle Robert than with him, and vows to become a better father. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is heartbroken to discover her parents have decided to split up and go their separate ways. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith (Bebe Neuwirth) arrives out of the blue and tries to rekindle her relationship with Frasier. He manages to resist her charms, but Niles is not as strong-willed. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A cousin's wedding reunites the Cranes with a Greek branch of the family - and forces Frasier to deal with an old grudge against his aunt Zora. Kelsey Grammer stars, with a guest appearance by Broadway star Patti LuPone

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A new radio personality becomes the talk of the town, but Frasier takes an instant dislike to him. Martin is thrown out of Niles' favourite shop - the only local establishment that sells Eddie's preferred brand of dog food. Comedy, guest starring Bill Campbell

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Phillip and Janet call on friends and family as they're down to the wire trying to finish the bridal suite in time for their daughter Penny's wedding. Mariam and Johnno get to work preparing all their bedrooms as they're due to host seven guests in three weeks' time. It's far from easy as Mariam struggles to find enough material to make curtains and finds out that a custom-made mattress doesn't fit an antique bed. Emma and Paul complete their Charles Rennie Mackintosh-themed bedroom in time for Emma's brother George's visit to celebrate his 60th birthday

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host from the West Midlands are free spirits Michelle and Carl, who present a menu based on home-grown produce. The second night sees dinner party newcomers Katie and Phil opt for an ambitious menu for their first ever dinner party. However, with potato rivalry, a disappointing dessert and Carl's jokes in full effect, have the hosts bitten off more than they can chew? Day three sees Petra and her Italian husband Sergio opt for Italian home-cooked food in their bid to win the £1,000

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs create miniature cone-shaped and carrot-shaped desserts - 24 of each. For the second challenge they must serve up a grand occasion showpiece - a Religieuse a l'Ancienne - to serve 24 people, with two different flavours of eclairs and inspired by the theme of time travel. Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden judge their efforts

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The realities of policing home drinking, and what happens when parties go very badly wrong, seen through the eyes of South Yorkshire Police's frontline officers. PCs Alice Marshall and Matt Spaven investigate a house party that's a concern for neighbours, while PCs Mohammed Alrobaidi and Bernice Gott find themselves at risk at a rowdy house party in a quiet street. In Rotherham, PCs Pete Ellard and Tabitha Rumney have their hands full with a drunk and disorderly couple who are violently resisting arrest

programme.title: Dogging Tales
programme.desc: True Stories documentary by photographer Leo Maguire, providing an insight into why men and women engage in or watch sexual activity in front of strangers in public areas after dark. Accompanying his participants to lay-bys, woods and picnic spots around the UK, they discuss their attraction to dogging and reveal how they were introduced to it

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A final romp through the Naked Attraction archive, remembering the times that the pickers got it spot on and chose their perfect date, leading to romance and happy endings. The success stories include Gemma and James, who found love on the show and whose relationship is still going strong

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to the heart of Los Angeles, California, to save the Brownstone Bistro, a Caribbean fusion restaurant. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises with a vibrant look, create more space in the cramped kitchen and introduce a simplified menu featuring fresh and authentic Caribbean fare, working around the clock to teach the staff how to cook the dishes

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cambridgeshire couples Wizz and Luke, Diana and Mark, and Ed and Steve try children's parties, fine dining and an enormous trifle in their respective bids to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Cocoon (2020)
programme.desc: Quiet 14-year-old Nora drifts through life in the shadow of her more confident older sister. She has her own way of looking at the world but she isn't sure why - until she meets cool new girl Romy, who causes her to question her personal feelings. Coming-of-age drama, starring Lena Urzendowsky, Jella Haase and Lena Klenke. In German

programme.desc: Frank becomes jealous when Marco begins spending time with Marie, and insists they end their friendship. His actions get the backing of Ray, who does not approve of married women having male pals - especially not his mother. Starring Ray Romano and Peter Boyle

programme.desc: The radio psychiatrist dates a beautiful woman, but drives everyone crazy when he begins to feel insecure about his own looks. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

Surfing is Jamie's passion, so he and wife Sam are looking for somewhere a stone's throw from the beach. Musicians Me'sha and Darren have viewed 70 properties but cannot seem to let go of anything on their wish list

Meanwhile, when another drug dealer confesses to Sean's murder, it looks like the criminal family will get away with it - until Bianca makes a discovery that turns everything on its head

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers

Despite a number of leads the police have never managed to catch Rita's murderer and with a case that's 53 years old, Emilia and David have a challenge tracking down witnesses, other potential victims and a suspect

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Extended edition in which Gordon Ramsay revitalises three businesses in Ellicott City, Maryland, which suffered flood damage in 2016 and 2018. It's such a huge undertaking that for the first time ever, Gordon dumps the 24-hour time limit

Finally, Jane and Paul's menu celebrates Jane's favourite things, but gets mixed reviews

programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to conceal an embarrassing accident by telling Frank they fell down the stairs, sending him into a DIY frenzy that puts him in hospital

programme.desc: Debra and Marie hatch an elaborate plan to get Amy back with Robert - but only succeed in driving her into the arms of an all-too-eager Gianni

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A broken Swiss watch, car trouble, a birthday surprise and a party thrown by Niles's latest lover all combine to ruin Frasier's chances of romance with an attractive new acquaintance. With Kelsey Grammer and Lisa Waltz

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Emma and Paul take on a massive garden project as they clear a lake bed with the aim of connecting it to their current lake, while they also bring their vine house back to life by creating an al fresco dining area. Mariam and Johnno turn on the style as they launch their chateau as an events venue by inviting locals over for a 1930s-themed party. And Karen and Paul's hopes for the stable and coach house to become a wedding venue are put in jeopardy as the costs of the roof renovations spiral out of control

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At Pickwick Pawnbrokers in south-east London, Nathan and Debs try to do deals on a kit car and some fairground swing boats. At Cashbrokers in Penzance, head honchos Larry and Neil consider some luxury bags, a posh watch and an FA Cup medal

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game where contestants pit their wits against the clock. Rufus Hound is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and Darrell from south-west London are looking for a holiday home on the Balearic Island of Menorca to enjoy with their two young children and Darrell's grown-up son. They run their own busy human resources company together so cannot wait to find a bolthole to relax in and have some quality time as a family. With a budget of £300,000 Danni Menzies is on hand to show them five properties around the south of the island

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with a London couple who opened a successful B&B in Spain and a family whose members swapped Blackpool for France to run a classic-car parts business

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, long-time married couple Karen and Nigel kick off the competition with a Bajan menu inspired by Nigel's West Indian heritage. However, banter buddies Jo and Charlie aren't loving the Caribbean cuisine. On day two twenty-somethings Beth and Clem attempt to cook restaurant-standard food, with a celebrity twist. However, not everyone is a fan of the fine dining experience. Finally, Jo and Charlie rely on a night of Greek gastro goodies to win the £1,000 prize on offer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty's ancient jokes and politically incorrect impressions go down like a lead balloon at a charity comedy festival - so he decides to spice up his act by adding more alternative, adult-oriented material. Featuring the guest voice of chat show host Jay Leno, alongside comedians Steven Wright and Janeane Garofalo

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Walter urges Toby not to tell Cleo the truth, and new parents Tony and Diane have a terrifying experience. Celeste gives Yazz and Tom some advice

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats chocolate Labrador Inca, who has a history of developmental elbow disease and osteoarthritis that has led to her elbow joints becoming worn out. Two-year-old Cavapoo Nala, who has hip dysplasia, and Great Dane Charles, who is unsteady on his feet due to a squashed spinal cord, are also on the patients list. Charles' owner Steve knows only too well that spinal surgery is a hugely serious undertaking, as he himself had multiple surgeries following a bike accident a decade earlier

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Kate and Erik restore their 150-year-old sash window and turn their small landing into a beautiful space for all the family that not only looks amazing and brings the past back to life, but saves thousands of pounds. Angel reveals the art of creating repeat patterns on fabric as a unique solution to Jo and family's desire to display their precious vintage family photos in something other than a frame. Dick solves Suzanna and Luke's conundrum of how to turn a treasured wardrobe into a showcase for shoes, by designing ingenious shelving inspired by a visit to the kitchen

programme.title: We Are Lady Parts
programme.desc: Publicly shamed, shunned by her university friends and out of Lady Parts, Amina is at an all-time low, so is grateful when Noor offers to help her get back on track - firstly by finding a respectable man to marry who will overlook her transgressions. Meanwhile, Momtaz takes it upon herself to get the band back together. Comedy, with Anjana Vasan, Juliette Motamed, Lucie Shorthouse and Sarah Kameela Impey

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, Gyles Brandreth and Maureen Lipman, Iain Stirling and Laura Whitmore, Sunetra Sarker and Georgia Taylor, Lorraine Kelly and Rosie Smith, Melanie C and her brother Paul, Clare Balding and Alice Arnold, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, and Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford appraise shows including Clarkson's Farm, Snakes on a Plane, Fresh, Fried and Crispy, Lupin, 10 Years Younger in 10 Days and Tiny World. Plus, news coverage of the G7 summit and a story about a man swallowed by a whale

programme.title: Love, Simon (2018)
programme.desc: Coming-of-age comedy drama about a secretly gay high-school student who begins to fall for an anonymous classmate after exchanging emails with the boy, known as 'Blue'. While trying to discover Blue's identity, Simon must also find himself. Starring Nick Robinson, Jennifer Garner and Josh Duhamel

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Greenville, Mississippi, to save fine dining establishment Sherman's Restaurant, which has been a presence in the town for 30 years. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to revamp the premises, clean and renovate the kitchen and introduce a new menu featuring update versions of the restaurant's staple dishes, working around the clock to teach the staff how to prepare them

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rugby enthusiast Andy and dental nurse Holly kick off the competition in Yorkshire with a Mexican fiesta - a fun-filled evening, but with a few blunders in the kitchen. Day two sees married couple Mitesh and Jess cooking up an Indian-inspired meal, but with a couple of spice-fearing guests, they have a tough crowd to please. Finally, it's the turn of Yorkshire couple Paul and Mandy to host with some 'proper grub'. After two nights of Paul larking around he has a few surprises in and out of the kitchen to try to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, more than half a million Eritreans have fled their home in eastern Africa, escaping one of the most repressive and secretive dictatorships in the world. Reporting in Eritrea is almost impossible but for more than five years, Evan Williams has been gathering secretly shot footage from inside the country and interviewing some of those who have escaped. Here he documents allegations of torture, arbitrary detention and indefinite forced conscription into military service

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts: Go Home Polish
programme.desc: Angered by graffiti scribbled in a British backstreet demanding 'Go Home Polish', a photographer embarks on a 1,000-mile walk back to his birthplace in search of home. Directed by Ian Smith

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The brides and grooms defying the jihadist militants laying siege to the city of Maiduguri in Nigeria, spiritual home of Boko Haram, a terrorist group at the centre of an insurgency that has killed over 36,000 people and displaced more than two million. With Covid lockdowns over and the militants driven out to north-eastern Nigeria, Yousra Elbagir discovers a city determined to reclaim the joy of weddings despite the ongoing risk of kidnappings and attacks. The reporter hears stories of loss and desperation, but also meets the residents determined to repair mental scars and rebuild Maiduguri for its people

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts: Rhiw Goch (On the Red Hill)
programme.desc: The intimate story of a Welsh farmhouse that was passed down a generation thanks to an unlikely friendship. Directed by Anna Winstone

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps more people as they build affordable dream homes. He begins in Hertfordshire with retired firefighter Bob and his wife Wendy, who spent years looking for the perfect building plot - until they found it in their back garden. They want somewhere to play music, paint and write, but they soon find themselves facing an ever-expanding budget to finish the house

programme.desc: The King declares no one is allowed to celebrate his birthday because he does not want to get any older

programme.desc: Peppa thinks she might need glasses, so Mummy Pig takes her to the optician

programme.desc: Josh and Blue bake a cake from the Philippines

programme.desc: Bulgy thinks people should travel by bus instead of rail, and when he sees an accident at the construction site that pollutes the water tower, he does not tell anyone

programme.title: Inside Tesco: 24/7
programme.desc: Documentary series charting the story of Britain's biggest retailer. The second episode charts the company's reinvention from 100 small shops to a retail empire ruled by founder Jack Cohen, who decided to change his business model in order to offer lower prices to cash-strapped customers in post-war Britain. In the years to come, Jack continued to expand the business and opened bigger stores, and also implemented a customer loyalty scheme which helped to dramatically increase the brands popularity in the 1960s. The story of the past is set against behind-the-scenes filming in 2020, connecting the milestones of the company's history and the business today

programme.desc: Documentary about people with a compulsion to constantly move their feet. It's a condition so severe for some that they want to have their legs chopped off. programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb investigates the origins of the obsession for mass witch-hunts and trials that swept the British Isles during the 17th century. Travelling to Scotland and Denmark, she challenges the accepted wisdom that King James VI of Scotland, later James I of England, was responsible for stirring up the hysteria. She also tells the story of Scotland's first mass witch trial in 1590 and the infamous Pendle witch trials towards the end of his reign

programme.title: A New Life in Oz
programme.desc: The Bradstreet family give up Northamptonshire for Adelaide, despite having no jobs, no loved ones and no roof over their heads in their new home. Cameras follow dad Justin, partner Yvette and daughter Sienna on an adventure into the unknown. Aside from celebrating Christmas in July, there's another culture shock as they have a close encounter with great white sharks

programme.title: Witches: A Century of Murder
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb's investigation into the notorious 17th-century witch trials concludes with a profile of Matthew Hopkins, the opportunistic puritan witch-hunter who transformed paranoia about Satanism into a lucrative business as he hanged hundreds of people for crimes they could not possibly have committed. Making use of contemporary reports, Suzannah paints a portrait of a man who believed he could cross any boundary and break any law to achieve his goals. Naming himself 'Witchfinder General', Hopkins toured the country charging fees for his services, but Suzannah's research reveals that ultimately, the public's distaste for witches was not as strong as its hatred of being conned by charlatans. Hopkins would eventually die of tuberculosis in relative obscurity, but his malign legacy lived on across the Atlantic, as witch-hunts began in Salem, Massachusetts

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Paul Binski visits Liverpool's two cathedrals, which lie at either end of Hope Street. Despite having been built within 60 years of each other they represent starkly contrasting styles, the Anglican edifice being a vast tribute to neo-Gothic design and its Catholic counterpart a typical example of 1960s modernism

programme.desc: A German spy falls for an apparently sympathetic schoolteacher during a First World War mission, unaware the object of his affections is in fact an English double agent, a situation that threatens to jeopardise an operation to destroy the British fleet in the Orkneys in 1917. Powell and Pressburger's romantic drama, starring Conrad Veidt, Valerie Hobson and Marius Goring

programme.title: The File on Thelma Jordon (1950)
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney falls for a woman suspected of murdering her aunt, so he covers up evidence that may incriminate her as he attempts to get her acquitted. Film noir, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Wendell Corey

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go! (1966)
programme.desc: International Rescue is called in to save the first manned space mission to Mars from sinister hijacker The Hood, and ensure a second attempt goes to plan. Puppet adventure based on Gerry Anderson's TV series, featuring the voices of Shane Rimmer, Ray Barrett, Alexander Davion, Peter Dyneley, Sylvia Anderson and Cliff Richard, voicing a puppet version of himself

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Deadpool (2016)
programme.desc: A fast-talking former mercenary develops terminal cancer, and agrees to be the subject in a shady experiment in the hope of a cure. The procedure leaves him horribly disfigured, but also possessing superhuman abilities which he immediately puts to use in a quest for revenge on the man responsible for his hideous appearance. Superhero comedy adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds and Morena Baccarin

programme.title: Chaos (2005)
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his inexperienced new partner are assigned to investigate a bank heist. At first sight, no money appears to have been stolen. However, it eventually emerges the criminal mastermind behind the robbery had a more complex and profitable scheme in mind - and a possible connection to the detective on his trail. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes

programme.title: The Neon Demon (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring model arrives in Los Angeles, but her beauty and youth soon generate intense fascination and jealousy within the fashion industry. Nicolas Winding Refn's psychological horror, starring Elle Fanning, Jena Malone, Bella Heathcote, Abbey Lee, Christina Hendricks and Keanu Reeves

programme.title: The Million Pound Note (1954)
programme.desc: An eccentric multimillionaire bets his equally rich brother that if a man is known to be wealthy, he can obtain everything he needs on credit. To put this theory to the test, they give a £1million note to a penniless seaman, but instruct him never to spend it. Comedy adapted from a story by Mark Twain, starring Gregory Peck, Jane Griffiths, Joyce Grenfell and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence

programme.title: Legend of the Lost (1957)
programme.desc: A grizzled adventurer living in Timbuktu is hired to escort a mysterious explorer across the Sahara desert in search of a fabled lost city. A local woman joins the men on their quest, but when the trio reach their destination the explorer reveals his plan to betray his companions and leave them high and dry. Adventure, starring John Wayne, Sophia Loren and Rossano Brazzi

programme.title: Meet Dave (2008)
programme.desc: Tiny emotionless aliens on a mission to save their homeworld travel to Earth aboard a spacecraft in human form, where they plan to drain the planet's oceans. However, the miniature explorers have a change of heart when they encounter Man - and are unprepared for their vessel falling in love. Sci-fi comedy, starring Eddie Murphy and Elizabeth Banks

programme.title: Bad Times at the El Royale (2018)
programme.desc: In the late 1960s, several strangers, many with a secret to bury, meet by chance at a rundown Lake Tahoe's hotel with a dark past. During the course of one night, everyone will show their true colours. Director Drew Goddard's mystery thriller, starring Jeff Bridges, Cynthia Erivo and Dakota Johnson

programme.title: Plastic (2014)
programme.desc: A gang of credit card thieves accidentally steals from a gangster, who demands to be paid back 10 times over. The leader of the group comes up with a plan to carry out a daring jewellery heist in Miami, but his scheme is undermined as his team begin to turn on each other. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Ed Speleers, Will Poulter and Alfie Allen

programme.title: Anomalisa (2015)
programme.desc: A motivational speaker beaten down by his failing marriage and dull routine checks into a hotel as her prepares to attend a conference. He finds himself drawn to a lonely woman, and their chance encounter helps him to get to grips with his existential despair. Stop-motion animated drama, with the voices of David Thewlis, Jennifer Jason Leigh and Tom Noonan

programme.title: Thunder Bay (1953)
programme.desc: A former Navy engineer comes up with a plan to establish an offshore oil drilling site on the Louisiana coast. However, his scheme is threatened by dangerous weather conditions, his own treacherous financial backers, and irate locals who fear for their fishing business. Action adventure, with James Stewart and Joanne Dru

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn (1942)
programme.desc: A foreign correspondent working in occupied Norway is assigned to an RAF detail helping freedom fighters to sabotage an important German U-boat installation. He enlists the help of a local sea captain's daughter, but the plan goes wrong and he ends up in enemy hands, facing death by firing squad. Second World War adventure, with Hugh Williams, Deborah Kerr and Ralph Richardson

programme.title: The 39 Steps (1959)
programme.desc: An innocent man becomes embroiled in international espionage as he tries to uncover the meaning behind the cryptic last words of a mystery woman, whom he knew for only a brief time before finding her dying in his flat. He must flee for his life from foreign spies and the police, who think he is a murderer. Spy thriller based on John Buchan's novel, starring Kenneth More, Taina Elg, Barry Jones and James Hayter

programme.title: The Lady Vanishes (1979)
programme.desc: An American heiress befriends an elderly lady on a continental train journey, but wakes one morning to find she has disappeared and the other passengers deny having ever seen the missing woman - leading to suspicions that a conspiracy is afoot. Remake of Hitchcock's 1938 mystery, starring Elliott Gould, Cybill Shepherd, Angela Lansbury, Herbert Lom, Arthur Lowe and Ian Carmichael

programme.title: Jumper (2008)
programme.desc: A man discovers he has the ability to teleport, a talent he cleverly exploits to rob banks undetected while living a life of luxury all over the world. However, he soon learns he is not the only one with this power - and that a secret society of religious fanatics is determined to wipe out him and all of his kind. Fantasy thriller, with Hayden Christensen, Jamie Bell and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers find themselves on the run from the authorities when they receive mysterious phone calls informing them their lives are in danger. They are forced to follow the instructions of a woman who is tracking their every move, while at the same time trying to discover who is behind the conspiracy. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan, Rosario Dawson and Michael Chiklis

programme.title: Triple 9 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of corrupt cops that carries out bank robberies under the noses of their law-abiding colleagues is blackmailed into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist by the Russian Mob. They realise that the only way to carry out the crime is to kill a police officer as a diversion. Crime thriller, starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, Casey Affleck, Kate Winslet and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Lowlife (2017)
programme.desc: A ruthless LA crime boss connects three down-and-out reprobates who become mixed up in an organ-harvesting scheme. Comedy drama, starring Nicki Micheaux, Ricardo Adam Zarate and Jon Oswald

However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Baby Daddy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
